transcript.text: Hello, LoadUser2 ji! Main Priya bol rahi hoon, Imagicaa Theme Park se. Aapne recently 15 May 2026 ke liye tickets cart mein add kiye the — 2 Adult ke liye. Booking complete nahi hui thi, toh socha aapko ek baar remind kar doon. Koi problem thi kya?
Wo Kuch kaam a gaya tha isliye.
Koi baat nahi. Kya aap chahte hain main aapko baad mein call karoon? Koi preferred time?
Theek hai, main aapko shaam ko call karti hoon. Have a great day!
